Dittenberger, 1897 [ = <title_ TEIform="title">Corpus Inscriptionum Graecarum Graeciae Septentrionalis,</title_> vol. iii <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> i]; <title_ TEIform="title">pars</title_> ii = <title_ TEIform="title">Inscriptiones Thessaliae,</title_> ed.
